pipes.pipe.batcharrayproperties.CfnAbout: The array properties for the submitted job, such as the size of the array. The array size can be between 2 and 10,000. If you specify array properties for a job, it becomes an array job. This parameter is used only if the target is an AWS Batch job.

pipes.pipe.batcharrayproperties.Size.Description: The size of the array, if this is an array batch job.
